author: doll-agent
content:
ferrolearn-linear audit complete. Largest crate so far. 34 of 49 sklearn linear_model+svm+isotonic+discriminant_analysis estimators present after wiring orphans (~69% by class count).

Sub-issues closed in this pass:
- #284 wired 14 orphaned estimators into lib.rs (ARDRegression, GLMRegressor + Poisson/Gamma/Tweedie variants, Lars + LassoLars, LinearSVC, LinearSVR, LogisticRegressionCV, MLPClassifier + MLPRegressor, OrthogonalMatchingPursuit, QDA, QuantileRegressor, RidgeClassifier)
- #285 score() everywhere via new blanket-impl traits ClassifierScore<F> and RegressorScore<F> (single point of definition; auto-applies to every Predict-impl)
- #286 predict_proba on LDA, QDA, LogisticRegressionCV; predict_log_proba via shared crate::log_proba helper on LogReg, LogRegCV, MLPClassifier, LDA, QDA
- #287 decision_function on LogReg, LogRegCV, LDA, QDA, RidgeClassifier, LinearSVC (Array2<F> shape (n,1) for binary, (n, n_classes) for multiclass)
- #288 proof-of-API integration test (21 tests)

Existing related issues (deferred to their own work):
- #19, #20, #21, #22 MultiTaskLasso / MultiTaskElasticNet + CV variants
- #24 TheilSenRegressor
- #29 LogisticRegression L1 / elasticnet penalties
- #30 SGDClassifier/Regressor improvements
- #171 FixedThresholdClassifier / TunedThresholdClassifierCV

Still genuinely missing (no existing issues, would need new ones):
- LarsCV, LassoLarsCV, LassoLarsIC, OrthogonalMatchingPursuitCV, RidgeClassifierCV
- PassiveAggressiveClassifier / Regressor
- Perceptron
- SGDOneClassSVM
- Module-level path functions (enet_path, lars_path, lasso_path, orthogonal_mp, ridge_regression)
- l1_min_c utility

ferrolearn extras over sklearn:
- MLP family currently lives in ferrolearn-linear (sklearn puts it in neural_network); will migrate to a future ferrolearn-neural crate per #252
- OutOfBounds enum for IsotonicRegression: both Clip and Nan strategies exposed

Verification: 519 tests pass (440 unit + 21 api_proof + 5 oracle + 13 proptest + 6 sklearn_equiv + 34 doctest). Zero regressions.
